name: Anomalia O Despertar
short_description: Titan Tech was a factory known for creating machines that advanced humanity, but it was suddenly shut down with the disappearance of several employees. When you wake up you will come across machines that will try to catch you, Be smart and survive, death will be the least of your worries.
detailed_description:
Anomaly Awakening is a not-so-long game, in which the player will experience a First Person experience,
He will be in a place where he will have to unlock doors to advance, find keys while trying to survive Robots with different mechanics.
The player will have to dodge and survive, if caught, he will take a Jumpscare or Scare and will die.

- First person game
- Keyboard and mouse gameplay
You will be able to walk, jump and interact with doors and objects to achieve objectives.
Enemies will chase you at times and if they get close, or you fail to complete an objective, they will jump on the screen and scare you, resulting in death.

Don't expect a long game, but one with an interesting story with notes spread around the scene that will help you get a sense of the story.
